issues.description: Action type is 'Rest' but card effect requires setting a Character as active (opposite of rest). Should be a custom action or clarified as activating/unrest action. 'Rest' would exhaust the character, contradicting 'set up as active'.
Target filter missing type requirement '{Minks}'. Current scope only filters by maxCost:5, but should also include type filter for Minks Characters.
Missing cost condition: effect requires ② (resting 2 DON!! cards). Should include condition checking HasAttachedDon >= 2 or similar cost validation before action executes.
